report_name: Supply Chain Attack Hits Global Wings Airline: 5 Million Passengers' Data Exposed in Vendor Breach

threat_actors.name: Unknown Actor
threat_actors.description: The unidentified threat actor responsible for the breach of a third-party vendor managing the Global Wings Airline 'SkyMiles' loyalty program.

attack_patterns.name: Trusted Relationship
attack_patterns.description: The breach occurred through a third-party service provider responsible for managing the 'SkyMiles' loyalty program, exploiting the trusted relationship between the airline and its vendor.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: Unauthorized actors exfiltrated a database containing the PII of 5 million airline passengers from the compromised third-party vendor.

identities.name: Global Wings Airline
identities.description: A major international airline whose passenger data was exposed due to a security failure at a third-party vendor managing its 'SkyMiles' loyalty program.

identities.name: Global Wings Airline Passengers
identities.description: Approximately 5 million passengers whose personally identifiable information (PII), including names, dates of birth, contact details, and passport numbers, was exposed in the breach.

indicators.name: Post-Breach Phishing Email Referencing Global Wings SkyMiles
indicators.pattern:
title: Post-Breach Phishing Email Referencing Global Wings SkyMiles
id: 2b9a7c3d-1e8f-4b5a-9c6d-3e4f5a6b7c8d
status: experimental
description: Detects phishing emails that leverage the Global Wings Airline data breach, referencing 'Global Wings' or 'SkyMiles' and containing suspicious keywords related to account security or financial information.
references:
  - https://www.wsj.com/articles/global-wings-airline-breach-exposes-5-million-passengers-data
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-26
tags:
  - attack.t1566
level: medium
logsource:
  category: email
detection:
  selection_keywords:
    Subject|contains:
      - 'Global Wings'
      - 'SkyMiles'
  selection_suspicious:
    Body|contains:
      - 'security issue'
      - 'account suspended'
      - 'verify your identity'
      - 'secure your points'
      - 'unusual activity'
      - 'password'
      - 'financial'
  condition: 1 of selection_keywords and 1 of selection_suspicious
indicators.description: Detects potential phishing emails targeting victims of the Global Wings Airline breach by looking for keywords related to the airline and common phishing lures in the email subject and body.
